result:
**Goal: Add a Mandelbrot/Julia Set Fractal Explorer mode.**

An interactive fractal viewer that renders the Mandelbrot set (and switchable Julia sets) in the terminal using Unicode density characters and color gradients. The user would be able to pan, zoom in/out to explore the infinite detail, adjust max iterations for detail vs. speed, and toggle between Mandelbrot and various Julia set constants — all fitting the existing keyboard-driven, curses-based architecture of the project.
